channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in Canada
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in Canada — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Masters of the Universe — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 7.3 · Worth a watch — After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of…

item.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds — Paramount Plus
item.description: Paramount Plus · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Follow Captain Christopher Pike, Science Officer Spock and Number One in the years before Captain Kirk boarded the U.S.S.

item.title: The East Palace — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Korean · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: Dastaar — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Punjabi · Just released — verdict soon — A Sikh immigrant rises from newcomer to community leader following a devastating racist attack.

item.title: Lucky — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 7.1 · Worth a watch — When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.9 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Dhamaal 4 — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — The Dhamaal boys are back for another treasure hunt, facing hilarious challenges in their quest for the Treasure of Life.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.8 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Alliance — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Hindi · Not enough ratings yet — A competitive captive reality show blending high-stakes strategy, economy and psychological warfare.

item.title: House of the Dragon — Crave
item.description: Crave · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Japanese · ★ 8.3 · Must watch — SEELE orders an all-out attack on NERV, aiming to destroy the Evas before Gendo can advance his own plans for the Human Instrumentality Project.

item.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Death and Rebirth — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Japanese · ★ 7.4 · Worth a watch — Originally a collection of clips from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, Death was created as a precursor to the re-worked ending of the series.
